reviews.review_title: Can one re-center by dragging touchpad?
reviews.review_description: Won't install on s8 exynos. First time user. Update - download is VERY VERY slow. Update 2 - Finally installed. Clean interface. But one feature seems to be lacking - ability to use the GearVR side touchpad to drag and re-center screen in real-time. Skybox is the only one that seems to be able to do this, unless I'm missing something.

developer_response.body: This has been suggested, but currently we are unable to integrate this feature. Thank you for your feedback.

reviews.review_description: Hey w2w and 22laos bud q
Working better then ever, also can find hidden (.nomedia) folders on internal and SD card.
Stopped working. Even after reinstall. Useless

I can't even get it to download.....internet connection is working fine. I am signed in correctly. But the oculus go thinks it downloaded correctly. Can you please send the install file to me somehow?

developer_response.body: Would you mind sending a request to support@deovr.com and we can send the file somehow through email. Also note that you wrote a review when writing a request to our support.

reviews.review_title: It stop working after the newest update
reviews.review_description:
The app stopped working on oculus Go after the newest version.
I tried factory reseting the oculus Go and the app still didn't work
Needs Network Connectivity -- Plex would be great.  Interface should offer that option as alternative to device storage.  Really not useful on my Note 8 / Gear VR otherwise.
Is an update with a multiplayer option planned? invite friends to listen to a movie with me .. make the app, a social app

developer_response.body:
Hello,
What do you mean by multiplayer?

reviews.review_title: Best VR app for Local Media
reviews.review_description:
This is the best app I've found with easy to use controls and available settings to adjust videos for Samsung GearVR when playing media from phone memory.
Only issue that I have came across is after update is completed it always says there's another update like it's not actually completing the update.
goes dark after a few seconds

developer_response.body: When did this problem first ocurred? Would you mind sending a request to our support@deovr.com and we can continue solving your problem there?

reviews.review_description: When I run slr speed test it shows very low test 10 and below. Resulting in stop and go videos. Very bad latency scores.

reviews.review_title: The best player. Best tech team😀
reviews.review_description:
The app is great and the best ,😀😀
simple to use, recentering works realy, not only horizontal!
also keeps the loops!(doesn't use a lot processing memory)
(once I had an update problem the tech team aswer me and fix it a few hours after!!!😀😀)
Thank you!!

First it tried to update and keeps failing.  So removed and went to reinstall now it wont install.

Cleared cache - nothing 
Reinstalled oculus suite - nothing 

So it was good while it lasted 

Are you sure you tested for all platforms? 

Doesnt look like it

developer_response.body: Is it GearVR or Go? On our phone I reinstalled the Oculus software again because it froze at uninstalling process. If you would need additional help we would gladly help you via support@deovr.com email.

reviews.review_description: need update,pls

reviews.review_title: OVER A YEAR AND STILL ...NO SUBTITLES!!!
reviews.review_description:
IT'S BEEN OVER A YEAR AND DEOVR  STILL HAS NO SUBTITLE SUPPORT FOR OCULUS GO!!!!!    Are we going to have to wait again another year? Why is it SOOO difficult for YOU deovr developer's to put the MOST IMPORTANT  item in a player? Every other VR player supports SRT except yours. 

- NOTHING is more important than srt support and this player is COMPLETELY WORTHLESS without srt support! We have movies in Japanese, German, French, ect., and we STILL can't watch them on DeoVR because we can't understand what their saying!!

Extremely frustrating having to spend time on a feature that should be OBLIGATORY for any movie player..... especially for those who are deaf. 
And yet you guys STILL keep saying over and over again,..... "It's on our to do list"!  .........For any developer, this should be a number one top priority. 
Again,  VERY DISAPPOINTING AND EXTREMELY FRUSTRATING!!!!

developer_response.body: It's on the list as mentioned, but currently it's not a priority, due to other pressing issues and because it's not very easy to implement. We will try to expedite this however.

reviews.review_description:
Sadly this app as just stop accessing external and internal storage with samsung gear vr since installing android 10, i get error access denied, was a great app for vr play back, please fix if all possible.

Quick update app is working fine now since 6.7 update with android 10 installed.
Since 2 days deovr has become unusable, it turns black after 5 seconds.

developer_response.body: Is this for GearVR or OculusGo? Did you try restarting the app? Does it work?

reviews.review_description: It would be better with network steaming caoability.

developer_response.body: This feature is on our "To do" list. As soon as we finish current task (controllers), we will start working on that feature.

reviews.review_title: Great for some sites, unusable others
reviews.review_description: When it works, it works really well. Unfortunately, for a lot of sites that I try, every time I close the application and reopen it later, the side bar to scroll disappears, and clicking anything with either the remote or the headset doesn't work. I have to uninstall the program and re install it again fresh every time if I want to get that website to work ever beyond the 1st log in and use.
Can't figure out how to make it work

developer_response.body: What seems to be the problem? Where does it get stuck for you? You can write to us at support@deovr.com and we would gladly help solving your problem.
